project_description: Rewriting tariff rules engine from PL/SQL (40k lines) to Java microservice. Pricing rules for 200 tariff plans, receipt testing (10k test cases), shadow mode — parallel operation of old and new for 3 months with result comparison. Zero tolerance for billing errors.
client_history: Tariff engine — most important billing element. One error = million in claims.
risk_patterns: Tariff engines: every rule has exceptions, every exception has exceptions. +50% to estimate.
pm_comment: Discovered 35 undocumented rules in PL/SQL during code analysis.
